use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms, dashboards, and call-to-action sections
Interactive navigation buttons within applications and websites
Icon or text-based buttons for toolbars and control panels
Destructive action buttons for delete or remove operations
Ghost or outline buttons for secondary actions in layered UIs
ai_summary: A versatile, production-ready button component built with Radix UI Slot, class-variance-authority, and Tailwind CSS. Supports six variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and four sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Uses standard focus rings and hover states with smooth transitions. Designed as a foundational UI primitive for SaaS, e-commerce, and dev tool applications.
